Part.Source: Event Start &MDFeTomFrt = 1 //padrão Iniciar com 1 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) padraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', 'WPMDFe01Modal', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &mensagem, &PadDtaMod,ServerNow(),'P') padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'WPMDFe01Modal', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &mensagem, &PadDtaMod,ServerNow(),'P') &MdfePgtFrtBanCod = trim(SUBSTR(&mensagem,1,5)) &MdfePgtFrtBanAge = trim(SUBSTR(&mensagem,6,10)) &MdfePgtFrtChvPix = trim(SUBSTR(&mensagem,16,60)) &MdfePedCnpjFor = trim(SUBSTR(&mensagem,76,18)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' &MDFeCIOT.TooltipText = "Também Conhecido como conta frete." &MdfePgtFrtBanCod.TooltipText = "EX: 237-Bradesco; 748-Sicredi; 341-Itaú; 104 - Caixa Econômica" &MdfePedResPag.TooltipText = "responsável pelo pagamento do Vale Pedágio. Informar somente quando o responsável não for o emitente do CT-e." &MdfePedNroCom.TooltipText = "Número de ordem do comprovante de compra do Vale-Pedágio fornecido para cada veículo ou combinação veicular, por viagem." &MdfePedCnpjFor.TooltipText = "CNPJ da Empresa Fornecedora do Vale-Pedágio, ou seja, empresa que fornece ao Responsável pelo Pagamento do Vale-Pedágio os dispositivos do Vale-Pedágio." &MdfeConCnpj.TooltipText = "Informações dos contratantes do serviço de transporte." &MdfePosVale.TooltipText = "Possui Vale Pedágio?" &MDFeRNTRC.TooltipText = "Registro obrigatório do emitente do MDF-e junto à ANTT para exercer a atividade de transportador rodoviário de cargas por conta de terceiros e mediante remuneração." Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &FilCpj.Visible = False &MDFeMaxCiot.Visible = False &FilAmbEms.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridParcela.Rows = Page.Rows &GridParcelaCurrentPage = 1 &GridParcelaCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridParcelaPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows GridParcelaPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridParcela.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &RemoveCiot.JSEvent ('onclick', "confirm ('Tem certeza que deseja remover o CIOT?')") EndEvent Event Refresh &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod Do 'ValidaGrid' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridParcelaPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridParcelaPageCount = GridParcela.PageCount &GridParcelaCurrentPage = GridParcela.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveCiot = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridParcela.Load For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MdfeCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveParcela = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &ParMdfePgtParNro = MdfePgtParNro &ParMdfePgtParVct = MdfePgtParVct &ParMdfePgtParVlr = MdfePgtParVlr &ParEmpCod = EmpCod &ParFilCod = FilCod &ParMDFeCod = MDFeCod Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridParcelaPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridParcelaPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridParcelaCurrentPage -= 1 GridParcela.PreviousPage() Case GridParcelaPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridParcelaCurrentPage += 1 GridParcela.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridParcelaPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridParcelaCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridParcela.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridParcelaPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridParcela.Rows = GridParcelaPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridParcelaCurrentPage = 1 GridParcela.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter Do Case Case &MdfeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador and (&MDFeMaxCiot = 0 AND &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() AND &MdfePedCnpjFor.Trim().IsEmpty()) MSG('ATENÇÃO! Quando emitente tipo "Prestador de serviço" ao menos uma das informações é obrigatória, sendo elas o "CIOT" , "CONTRATANTE" ou "VALE-PEDÁGIO"') // Case &MdfeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador and &MDFeRNTRC.Trim().IsEmpty() and &MdfeOriUfeCod <> &MdfeDstUfeCod // MSG('ATENÇÃO! Quando emitente tipo "Prestador de serviço" e operação interestadual RNTRC é OBRIGATÓRIO') Case &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Contratante é obrigatório. Verifique') Case &ErroCnpjCon = 1 and not &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! CNPJ Contratante inválido. Verifique') Case &ErroCnpjPag = 1 and not &MdfePedResPag.Trim().IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! CNPJ Pagador inválido. Verifique') Case &MDFeTipMod = TipoModalidade.Rodoviario and &MdfePosVale = Status_SimNao.Sim AND &MdfeCatComVei.IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Categoria de combinação veicular é obrigatório para vale pedagio = SIM!') Case &MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim and &MdfePgtFrtBanCod.Trim().IsEmpty() and &MdfePgtFrtBanAge.Trim().IsEmpty() and &MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() and &MdfePgtFrtChvPix.Trim().IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Para pagamento de frete ao menos 1 das informações bancária é necessária. Verifique!') Case &MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim and &MDFeTomFrt.IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Para pagamento de frete é obrigatório selecionar o responsável. Verifique!') Case &MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim and &MdfePgtFrtTot <= 0 Msg('ATENÇÃO! Valor do contrato é obrigatório!') Case &MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim and &IsErroPgtoFrete = true Msg("Informe exatamente uma das opções de pagamento: (Banco e Agência) ou (Chave Pix) ou (CNPJ do IPEF).") OtherWise Do 'PegaPlacaeValida' &mensagem = Padl(trim(&MdfePgtFrtBanCod),5,' ') &mensagem += Padl(trim(&MdfePgtFrtBanAge),10,' ') &mensagem += Padl(trim(&MdfePgtFrtChvPix),60,' ') If &MdfePosVale = Status_simNao.Sim &mensagem += Padl(trim(&MdfePedCnpjFor),18,' ') EndIF padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'WPMDFe01Modal', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &mensagem, &PadDtaMod,ServerNow(),'P') If &IsMdfeAberto = True GravaModalMdfe.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MDFeCod,&MdfePedCnpjFor,&MdfePedNroCom,&MdfePedResPag,&MdfePedVlr,&MdfePedTip,&MdfeCatComVei,&MDFeRNTRC,&MDFeCIOT,&MDFeCIOTCnpj,&MdfeConCnpj,&MdfeConRaz,&MdfePosVale,&MDFePgtFrt,&MDFeTomFrt,&MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj,&MdfeInfPagFrtRaz,&MdfePgtFrtVlrPed,&MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa,&MdfePgtFrtVlrBan,&MdfePgtFrtVlrOut,&MdfePgtFrtVlrFre,&MdfePgtFrtDes,&MdfePgtFrtForPgt,&MdfePgtFrtBanCod,&MdfePgtFrtBanAge,&MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj,&MdfePgtFrtTot,&MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi,&MdfePgtFrtChvPix) &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MdfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod wpencerramentoMDFeTransmitir.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod,&MDFeVeiPla,&OldFilCod,&OldMdfeCod,&WebSessionKey) Else Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPMDFe01(!'Modal', !'Transmitir', false) EndIf if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPMDFe01(!'Modal', !'Transmitir', false) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndCase EndEvent Event 'WizardPrevious' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPMDFe01(!'Modal', !'Transporte', true) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarCIOT' Do case Case &MDFeCIOT.Trim().IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Nro CIOT obrigatório. Verifique!') Otherwise GravaCiotMdfe.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MDFeCod,0,&MDFeCIOT,&FilCpj) &MDFeCIOT = '' Refresh EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarParcelas' If &MdfePgtParVct.IsEmpty() or &MdfePgtParVlr = 0 Msg('ATENÇÃO! Vencimento e Valor devem ser preenchidos para adicionar a parcela') Else GravaParcelaMdfe.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod,&MdfePgtParVct,&MdfePgtParVlr) GridParcela.Refresh() EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod &FilCpj = &WizardData.Modal.FilCpj &MDFeMaxCiot = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeMaxCiot &FilAmbEms = &WizardData.Modal.FilAmbEms &MDFeCIOT = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeCIOT &MdfePgtParVlr = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVlr &MdfePgtParVct = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVct &MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj &MdfePgtFrtChvPix = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtChvPix &MdfePgtFrtBanAge = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanAge &MdfePgtFrtBanCod = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCod &MdfePgtFrtVlrPed = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrPed &MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa &MdfePgtFrtVlrBan = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrBan &MdfePgtFrtVlrOut = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrOut &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrFre &MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi &MdfePgtFrtForPgt = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtForPgt &MdfePgtFrtDes = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtDes &MdfePgtFrtTot = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtTot &MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtRaz &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj = &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj &MDFeTomFrt = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeTomFrt &MdfeCatComVei = &WizardData.Modal.MdfeCatComVei &MdfePedTip = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedTip &MdfePedVlr = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedVlr &MdfePedResPag = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedResPag &MdfePedNroCom = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedNroCom &MdfePedCnpjFor = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedCnpjFor &MdfeConRaz = &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConRaz &MdfeConCnpj = &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConCnpj &MDFePgtFrt = &WizardData.Modal.MDFePgtFrt &MdfePosVale = &WizardData.Modal.MdfePosVale &MDFeRNTRC = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod Do 'Load' EndIf if &MDFeCod.IsEmpty() wwMdfe.Link() Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Modal.FilCpj = &FilCpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFeMaxCiot = &MDFeMaxCiot &WizardData.Modal.FilAmbEms = &FilAmbEms &WizardData.Modal.MDFeCIOT = &MDFeCIOT &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVlr = &MdfePgtParVlr &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVct = &MdfePgtParVct &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj = &MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtChvPix = &MdfePgtFrtChvPix &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanAge = &MdfePgtFrtBanAge &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCod = &MdfePgtFrtBanCod &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrPed = &MdfePgtFrtVlrPed &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa = &MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrBan = &MdfePgtFrtVlrBan &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrOut = &MdfePgtFrtVlrOut &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrFre = &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi = &MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtForPgt = &MdfePgtFrtForPgt &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtDes = &MdfePgtFrtDes &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtTot = &MdfePgtFrtTot &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = &MdfeInfPagFrtRaz &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj = &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFeTomFrt = &MDFeTomFrt &WizardData.Modal.MdfeCatComVei = &MdfeCatComVei &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedTip = &MdfePedTip &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedVlr = &MdfePedVlr &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedResPag = &MdfePedResPag &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedNroCom = &MdfePedNroCom &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedCnpjFor = &MdfePedCnpjFor &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConRaz = &MdfeConRaz &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConCnpj = &MdfeConCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFePgtFrt = &MDFePgtFrt &WizardData.Modal.MdfePosVale = &MdfePosVale &WizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC = &MDFeRNTRC &WizardData.Modal.GridParcela.Clear() For Each Line in GridParcela &GridParcelaItem = new() &GridParcelaItem.ParMdfePgtParNro = &ParMdfePgtParNro &GridParcelaItem.ParMdfePgtParVct = &ParMdfePgtParVct &GridParcelaItem.ParMdfePgtParVlr = &ParMdfePgtParVlr &GridParcelaItem.parEmpCod = &parEmpCod &GridParcelaItem.parFilCod = &parFilCod &GridParcelaItem.parMDFeCod = &parMDFeCod &WizardData.Modal.GridParcela.Add(&GridParcelaItem) EndFor &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else GravaModalMdfe.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MDFeCod,&MdfePedCnpjFor,&MdfePedNroCom,&MdfePedResPag,&MdfePedVlr,&MdfePedTip,&MdfeCatComVei,&MDFeRNTRC,&MDFeCIOT,&MDFeCIOTCnpj,&MdfeConCnpj,&MdfeConRaz,&MdfePosVale,&MDFePgtFrt,&MDFeTomFrt,&MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj,&MdfeInfPagFrtRaz,&MdfePgtFrtVlrPed,&MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa,&MdfePgtFrtVlrBan,&MdfePgtFrtVlrOut,&MdfePgtFrtVlrFre,&MdfePgtFrtDes,&MdfePgtFrtForPgt,&MdfePgtFrtBanCod,&MdfePgtFrtBanAge,&MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj,&MdfePgtFrtTot,&MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi,&MdfePgtFrtChvPix) &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MdfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod //GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO // If &Context.PesCod = -1 and &FilAmbEms = TAmb.Homologacao GeraXmlMdfe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod = &MdfeCod &WizardData.Mdfe.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) // Else // TransmitirMDF.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) // &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod = &EmpCod // &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod = &FilCod // &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod = &MdfeCod // &WizardData.Mdfe.SolCod = &SolCod // &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) // EndIf EndIf EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If Not (&MdfePgtFrtForPgt = 2) &MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi.Visible = False MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi.Visible = True MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If Not (&MdfePgtFrtVlrOut >0) &MdfePgtFrtDes.Visible = False MdfePgtFrtDes_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &MdfePgtFrtDes.Visible = True MdfePgtFrtDes_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf TablePe.Visible = (&MdfePosVale = Status_SimNao.Sim) TablePgto.Visible = (&MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim) TableGridCiot.Visible = (&MDFeMaxCiot > 0) TableaPrazo.Visible = (&MdfePgtFrtForPgt = 1) TableRsp.Visible = (&MDFeTomFrt =2) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &MdfePgtFrtVlrPed.IsValid do 'SomaComponentes' EndEvent Event &MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa.IsValid do 'SomaComponentes' EndEvent Event &MdfePgtFrtVlrBan.IsValid do 'SomaComponentes' EndEvent Event &MdfePgtFrtVlrOut.IsValid do 'SomaComponentes' EndEvent Event &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre.IsValid do 'SomaComponentes' EndEvent Event &MDFeTomFrt.IsValid Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event &MDFePgtFrt.IsValid Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event 'Doefrete' // wpCiotEfrete.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MDFeCod) EndEvent Event &MdfePgtFrtForPgt.IsValid Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event &MdfePosVale.Click Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event &MdfeConCnpj.IsValid ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfeConCnpj, &ErroCnpjCon, &ObrigatorioCpfCnpj) Do 'Contratante' EndEvent Event &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj.IsValid ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj, &ErroCnpjPagFrt, &ObrigatorioCpfCnpj) Do 'ResponsavelPgto' EndEvent Event &MdfePedCnpjFor.IsValid ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfePedCnpjFor, &ErroCnpjFor, &ObrigatorioCpfCnpj) EndEvent Event &MdfePedResPag.IsValid ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfePedResPag, &ErroCnpjPag, &ObrigatorioCpfCnpj) EndEvent Event &RemoveCiot.Click GravaCiotMdfe.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeCiotCod,&MDFeCIOT,&FilCpj) refresh EndEvent Event &RemoveParcela.Click DeletaParcelaMdfe.call(&ParEmpCod,&ParFilCod,&ParMDFeCod,&ParMdfePgtParNro) GridParcela.Refresh() EndEvent Sub 'SomaComponentes' &MdfePgtFrtTot = 0 &MdfePgtFrtTot = &MdfePgtFrtVlrPed +&MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa+&MdfePgtFrtVlrBan+&MdfePgtFrtVlrOut+ &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre EndSub Sub 'PegaPlacaeValida' &MDFeVeiPla = '' &IsMdfeAberto = False For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &MDFeVeiPla = MDFeVeiPla Exit EndFor If Not &MDFeVeiPla.IsEmpty() Do 'ValidaMdfeNaoEncerrado' EndIf EndSub Sub 'ValidaMdfeNaoEncerrado' For each Order EmpCod,MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MDFeCod <> &MDFeCod Where MDFeVeiPla = &MDFeVeiPla Where MDFeSts = Status_Mdfe.Autorizado &OldFilCod = FilCod &OldMdfeCod = MDFeCod &IsMdfeAberto = True Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'Contratante' If not &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfeConCnpj, &erroc, 'N') For each order EmpCod,PesCpf Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCpf = &MdfeConCnpj or PesCnpj = &MdfeConCnpj &MdfeConRaz = PesRaz Exit EndFor EndIf EndSub Sub 'ResponsavelPgto' If not &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj, &erroc, 'N') For each order EmpCod,PesCpf Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCpf = &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj or PesCnpj = &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj &MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = PesRaz Exit EndFor EndIf EndSub Sub 'Load' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDfeCod &FilAmbEms = FilAmbEms &FilCpj = FilCpj &MdfeTipEmt = MDFeTipEmt If MDFeRNTRC.Trim().IsEmpty() &MDFeRNTRC = FilRNTRC Else &MDFeRNTRC = MDFeRNTRC EndIf &MDFeMaxCiot = MDFeMaxCiot &MdfeOriUfeCod = MDFeOriUfeCod &MdfeDstUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod &MdfeConCnpj = MdfeConCnpj &MdfeConRaz = MdfeConRaz &MdfePosVale = MdfePosVale &MDFePgtFrt = MDFePgtFrt &MDFeTipMod = MDFeTipMod &MDFeTomFrt = MDFeTomFrt &MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj = MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj &MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = MdfeInfPagFrtRaz If MdfePgtFrtTot.IsEmpty() &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre = MDFeVlrTot EndIf &MdfePgtFrtForPgt = MdfePgtFrtForPgt If not MdfePgtFrtBanCod.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfePgtFrtBanCod = MdfePgtFrtBanCod EndIf If not MdfePgtFrtBanAge.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfePgtFrtBanAge = MdfePgtFrtBanAge EndIf If not MdfePgtFrtChvPix.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfePgtFrtChvPix = MdfePgtFrtChvPix EndIf If not MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj = MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj EndIf &MdfePgtFrtTot = MdfePgtFrtTot &MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi = MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi do 'AttributesSecurityCode' exit EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod,MdfePedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDfeCod Where MdfePedCod = 1 If not MdfePedCnpjFor.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfePedCnpjFor = MdfePedCnpjFor EndIF &MdfePedNroCom = MdfePedNroCom &MdfePedResPag = MdfePedResPag &MdfePedVlr = MdfePedVlr &MdfePedTip = MdfePedTip &MdfeCatComVei = MdfeCatComVei exit EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod,MdfePgtFrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDfeCod Do Case Case MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.Despesas &MdfePgtFrtVlrBan = MdfePgtFrtVlr Case MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.Impostos &MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa = MdfePgtFrtVlr Case MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.Outros &MdfePgtFrtDes = MdfePgtFrtDes &MdfePgtFrtVlrOut = MdfePgtFrtVlr Case MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.ValePedagio &MdfePgtFrtVlrPed = MdfePgtFrtVlr Case MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.Frete &MdfePgtFrtVlrFre = MdfePgtFrtVlr EndCase EndFor EndSub Sub 'ValidaGrid' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDfeCod &MDFeMaxCiot = MDFeMaxCiot EndFor Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndSub
